positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, abstract vaporwave style. The mountains are represented by crisp, stylized geometric polygons in deep indigo, violet, and teal, contrasting sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of coral pink and warm orange. Foreground features stylized minimalist typography integrated subtly into the mountain base, reading 'Adventure Awaits'. Clean silhouette, high contrast, centered composition, optimized for screen printing and apparel texture. Studio quality, vector art precision, clean lines, flat color gradients, vibrant saturation, graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, complex background, noise, dirty, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low detail
